svg.title: Narrative fingerprint explorer — full ecosystem architecture
svg.desc: Three user roles connect to interfaces which feed the corpus, knowledge graph, and AI pipeline zones, governed by a shared layer at the bottom.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Describe the ontology steward role in depth')
sendPrompt('Describe the annotation trainer role in depth')
sendPrompt('Describe the research consumer role in depth')
sendPrompt('What features should the ontology editor have?')
sendPrompt('What should the annotation UI look like?')
sendPrompt('What should the research dashboard look like?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the event registry')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the corpus collector')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the post registry')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the abstract ontology layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the theory layers')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the annotation layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the annotation engine')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the lens config store')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the calibration loop')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ethics and consent layer')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about access control in this system')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the audit log')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about infrastructure requirements')
